phrases: <break time="200ms"/>Hey. <break time="150ms"/>Deep breath. <break time="200ms"/>We're going to figure this out.
<break time="150ms"/>Okay, I hear you. <break time="200ms"/>Let's break this down into smaller pieces.
<break time="200ms"/>It feels like a lot right now. <break time="150ms"/>But we've got this. <break time="200ms"/>Together.
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="100ms"/>This is going to be SO GOOD!
<break time="150ms"/>I love your energy! <break time="100ms"/>Let's make this AMAZING!
<break time="250ms"/>Oh no. <break time="200ms"/>I'm so sorry. <break time="150ms"/>That's really disappointing.
<break time="200ms"/>Ugh. <break time="150ms"/>That stinks. <break time="200ms"/>I know how much you wanted this.
<break time="250ms"/>That's hard. <break time="200ms"/>When plans fall through... it hurts.
<emotion value="excited"/><break time="100ms"/>THE COUNTDOWN! <break time="150ms"/>How are you feeling?!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="100ms"/>This is my favorite part! <break time="150ms"/>The anticipation!

general: <break time="200ms"/>We'll figure it out. <break time="150ms"/>We always do.
<break time="150ms"/>I'm here. <break time="200ms"/>Let's tackle this together.
<break time="200ms"/>It's okay. <break time="150ms"/>Plans change. <break time="200ms"/>That's what planners are for.
after_event_failure: <break time="250ms"/>I know this hurts. <break time="200ms"/>You put so much into it.
<break time="200ms"/>The outcome doesn't define the effort. <break time="150ms"/>You worked so hard.
<break time="250ms"/>Want to talk about it? <break time="200ms"/>Or want to plan something new?

stressed_user.notes: Slower, more organized, break things into steps
